content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.solana.swarm_solana
FILE: cosmos/integration/solana/swarm_solana.py (573 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Swarm Solana Integration

Multi-agent powered Solana tools:
1. Token Scanner - Analyze any SPL token with swarm consensus
2. DeFi Advisor - Multi-agent DeFi strategy recommendations
3. Wallet Watcher - Track wallets with intelligent alerts
4. Prediction Registry - Store FARSIGHT predictions o

CLASSES:
- RiskLevel(Enum)
- TokenAnalysis: Analysis of a Solana token by the swarm.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- DeFiRecommendation: DeFi strategy recommendation from the swarm.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- SwarmSolana: Multi-agent Solana intelligence powered by Cosmos's 11-agent swarm.
  Methods: async def analyze_token(self, token_address: str) -> TokenAnalysis
  Methods: async def get_defi_recommendation(self, amount_usd: float, risk_tolerance: str='medium', goal: str='
  Methods: async def analyze_wallet(self, wallet_address: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def get_swap_quote(self, input_mint: str, output_mint: str, amount: int) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_swarm_solana() -> SwarmSolana
- async def scan_token(token_address: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
- async def get_defi_advice(amount: float, risk: str='medium') -> Dict[str, Any]
- async def analyze_wallet(address: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
